query LolChampionCountersOptionsQuery.body:
query LolChampionCountersOptionsQuery(
    $slug: String!
    $role: Rolename
    $patch: String
    $queue: VirtualQueue
    $vsChampionSlug: String
    $rank: LolChampionRankFilter
    $region: Region
    $summonerRegion: Region
    $tagLine: String
    $gameName: String
  ) {
    lol {
      ...LolChampionCountersListFragment
      ...LolChampionCountersStatsFragment
      ...LolChampionCounterFragment
    }
  }

fragment NgfDocumentGameEntityFragment.body:
fragment NgfDocumentGameEntityFragment on NGFEntityObject {
    slug
    title
    type
    iconUrl
    color
  }

fragment NgfDocumentSeoFragment.body:
fragment NgfDocumentSeoFragment on NgfDocumentSeo {
    title
    description
    ogImage
    schemaMarkup
    canonicalUrl
    noIndex
  }

fragment NgfDocumentTagGroupFragment.body:
fragment NgfDocumentTagGroupFragment on NgfDocumentTagGroup {
    archived
    isHidden
    defaultSlug
    inputProhibitedForRegularUser
    useGroupName
    multiselect
    name
    noValue {
      description
      iconUrl
      name
    }
    required
    slug
    values {
      groupSlug
      archived
      description
      iconUrl
      imageUrl
      name
      pluralName
      slug
    }
  }

fragment NgfDocumentTagFragment.body:
fragment NgfDocumentTagFragment on NgfDocumentTag {
    groupSlug
    archived
    description
    iconUrl
    imageUrl
    pluralName
    name
    slug
  }
